title: lycopodium gymnogynum var. domingense
intro: Lycopodium gymnogynum var. domingense, also known as the Domingo's club moss, is a rare and unusual species of vascular plant that belongs to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Domingo's club moss include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although its availability and use are limited due to its rarity.
